summary: Completed comprehensive testing of expense management system including backend APIs, frontend UI, and data consistency across Dashboard and Budget pages. Backend APIs are fully functional with stable IDs and proper delete operations. Frontend has minor UI state management issues with delete operations.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete operation shows success toast but expense list doesn't update immediately in UI
ui_bugs.details: Backend delete API works correctly, but frontend state management doesn't refresh the expense list immediately after deletion. Requires page refresh to see updated list.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility
ui_bugs.details: Console warning about missing accessibility attributes for dialog component.

integration_issues.issue: UI state not updating after successful API call
integration_issues.details: Delete API call succeeds (confirmed by backend tests) but frontend doesn't refresh the expense list or update totals immediately.

passed_tests: GET /api/expenses returns expenses with stable IDs (same IDs on repeated calls)
DELETE /api/expenses/{id} successfully deletes expense and returns success
POST /api/expenses creates expense and it appears in GET /api/expenses
Frontend Dashboard loads and shows expenses correctly
Frontend Budget page loads with budget cards
Budget page expandable expense dropdown functionality works
Budget page shows correct spending totals and budget limits
Navigation between Dashboard and Budget pages works
Data consistency maintained between pages (after refresh)
All backend API endpoints return proper response format
Budget category cards display properly with progress bars
Spending analytics and insights display correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend state management for expense deletion - the delete API call works correctly but the UI doesn't update the expense list immediately. Need to refresh the expense list state after successful delete operation in Dashboard.jsx loadData() function.
